summary: Comprehensive testing of Construction CRM demo data - All tabs in Project Detail page and all role-specific boards tested successfully. Seed data is properly populated and displaying correctly across all views.

minor.issue: Stage names not returned - only showing numbers (1, 2, 3) instead of stage names like 'Foundation', 'Plinth Beam'
Payment stage names not returned - only showing numbers instead of stage names

ui_bugs.issue: Stage names display as numbers (1, 2, 3...) instead of actual names
Payment stage names display as numbers instead of actual names
Floor column is empty - floor names not displaying

integration_issues.issue: Kanban view shows 'No leads in this stage' for all stages despite 9 leads existing. Date filter may be causing this - List view works correctly

super_admin_dashboard.details: Project Swathi 60LG+2 displayed with correct financials - Value: ₹80L, Additions: ₹1.50L, Total: ₹81.50L, Income: ₹30L, Deductions: ₹23K, Balance: ₹50.77L

estimate_tab.details: RE Project USB-RE0001 displayed with rough scope items

final_estimate_tab.details: 13 scope items displayed with Active status, all from RE: USB-RE0001

stages_tab.details: 12 stages displayed (4 completed, 1 in_progress, 7 pending) but stage names missing

team_tab.details: 6 team members assigned - Architect (Deepa), PM (Vikram), SR SE (Suresh), SE (Ramesh), CRE (Anita), Procurement (Meera)

materials_tab.details: 10 material requests in various statuses (Requested, Planning Approved, Procurement Approved, Vendor Selected, In Transit, Received Completed)

labours_tab.details: 8 labour expense entries - Total: ₹7.31L, 49 workers, various statuses

work_orders_tab.details: 3 work orders - Selvam & Co, Kumar Electricals, Rajesh Plumbing

payments_tab.details: 8 payment stages (5 Collected, 3 Pending) but stage names missing

additional_tab.details: 2 additional cost entries - Extra waterproofing (₹80K), Compound wall extension (₹70K)

deduction_tab.details: 3 deduction entries - Late delivery penalty, Quality issue, Client discount - Total: ₹23K

documents_tab.details: 3 Site Plans (Approved), 5 3D Photos/Elevations displayed but floor names missing

sales_crm_board.details: 9 leads displayed in List view across different stages. Kanban view has date filter issue.

accounts_board.details: 5 income entries displayed, Financial Overview with all categories, Cashbook working

site_engineer_dashboard.details: 1 assigned project (Swathi 60LG+2), 5 Active Orders, Map with GPS location, all tabs available

planning_board.details: 1 Under Construction project, 2 Requests pending, Dashboard with all navigation options

procurement_board.details: 1 Approval pending, 1 Vendor Select pending, Material request for Electrical Wire displayed

action_items: Fix stage names not displaying in Stages tab - backend should return stage_name field
Fix payment stage names not displaying in Payments tab
Fix floor names not displaying in Documents tab Site Plans section
Investigate Sales CRM Kanban view date filter issue - leads not showing in Kanban columns
critical_code_review_comments: Stages and Payment stages are missing name field in API response - only returning numbers
Site Plans missing floor field data
Sales CRM Kanban view may have date filter logic issue
seed_data_creation: Seed script created comprehensive data: 1 project, 1 RE project, 9 leads, 13 scope items, 12 stages, 10 materials, 10 material requests, 8 labour expenses, 3 work orders, 5 income entries, 8 payment stages, 2 additional costs, 3 deductions, 5 design files, 3 site plans
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features working. Minor issues with stage names and floor names not displaying. Sales CRM Kanban view has date filter issue but List view works. Demo access buttons work for all roles.
rca_of_the_issue: Stage names and floor names are likely not being populated in the seed data or the API is not returning these fields. The Kanban view date filter may be filtering out leads created with dates outside the current date range.
